metadata.description: P4 — the prompty / prompter / pioneer / puppeteer meta-prompting framework; ships the Roboto four-lens reasoning instance as an installable plugin.

plugins.name: mister
plugins.description: Roboto / "The Init Elegance" — the four-lens reasoning instance of the P4 framework: identity, rubric, vlds, templates, bias-patterns, isomorphic-operations, sjc-indexer, activation, and persistence skills plus a roboto subagent.

plugins.name: vlds
plugins.description: VLDS — the P4 framework's epistemic decision gate as a standalone, single-skill plugin: verify before you assert, qualify what you can't verify. Routes every load-bearing claim through VERIFIABLE → VERIFIED → PROCEED / VERIFY_FIRST / QUALIFY. Portable; no dependency on the roboto instance.
